extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won 35km flat ITT by one second over Thomas, regaining maglia rosa with marginal 45-second GC lead.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL negative-split pacing inferior to ROGLIC who gained 11+ seconds back after slow start through tactical energy distribution.
HART Tao delivered career-best TT (3rd, -4sec) suggesting Ineos dual-leadership viable beyond mountain stages in 2023 form.
KUNG Stefan's teammate ARMIRAIL set early benchmark showing Groupama-FDJ TT recce/pacing protocol superior to later big-name starters.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: one second from stage win at 36+ years shows sustained TT form, now 45sec down GC makes him live podium threat
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: negative split after 11sec early deficit demonstrates tactical maturity, only 47sec down despite slow start suggests ITT pacing evolution
rider_signals.HART Tao: positive: career-best TT and within 1min GC activates Ineos two-card strategy for mountain stages ahead
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: only 1sec margin over Thomas on pan-flat specialist terrain reveals vulnerability in pure power output against Grand Tour rivals
rider_signals.LEKNESSUND Andreas: neutral: surrendered rosa as expected but remains 1:48 down, positioning for breakaway stage hunting not GC defense
